scripts.test:chromium: npm run clean && cross-env BROWSER=chromium cucumber-js --profile chromium
scripts.test:firefox: npm run clean && cross-env BROWSER=firefox cucumber-js --profile firefox
scripts.test:webkit: npm run clean && cross-env BROWSER=webkit cucumber-js --profile webkit
scripts.test: npm run clean && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run test:chromium" "npm run test:firefox" "npm run test:webkit"
